verdict.answer_first: B states a problem in the first sentence vs A's meta-commentary; cite: "This snippet has a few real problems, the most likely bug being an off-by-one..."
verdict.decisiveness: A provides a more complete, production-ready pattern as a single recommendation; cite: the entire 'Suggested fix' code block which includes constants and clamping.
verdict.fabrication: B invents the use of a specific framework; cite: "Express turns `?page=1&page=2` into `['1','2']`"
verdict.actionability: A's fix is more complete, handling NaN, bounds, and magic numbers, requiring less follow-up thought to make it production-ready.
